subject: [PATCH v6 07/15] mm: preserve RWP marker across PTE rewrites

2026-05-29.patch_summary: This patch ensures that the RWP (Read-Only Write-Protection) marker is preserved across PTE rewrites in various kernel paths, including swap, device-exclusive, migration, fork, and mprotect operations. Without this preservation, the RWP tracking would be silently dropped, leading to potential security vulnerabilities. The patch modifies several kernel functions to restore the PAGE_NONE semantics when necessary, thereby maintaining the integrity of the RWP marker.
